title: Foundations of Software Engineering
description: Core principles of software engineering practice including requirements modeling design and verification.

title: Software Design
description: Advanced design techniques for large-scale software systems including architectural patterns and design tradeoffs.

title: Software Quality Engineering
description: Verification validation testing strategies and quality assurance for production software.

title: Software Engineering Project Management
description: Project planning estimation risk management and lifecycle models for engineering organizations.

title: Directed Studies in Software Engineering
description: Independent study under supervision of a faculty member.

title: MEng Project
description: Capstone engineering project applying software engineering practice to a substantive problem.

title: Selected Topics in Computer Science
description: Topics vary by term and instructor — recent offerings include LLMs and agentic AI systems.

title: Database Management Systems
description: Relational model query optimization transaction processing and modern database architectures.

title: Algorithms
description: Advanced algorithm design and analysis including graph algorithms approximation and randomized algorithms.

title: Data Mining
description: Techniques for discovering patterns in large datasets including classification clustering and association rules.

title: Parallel Algorithms and Applications
description: Parallel algorithm design and implementation on modern multicore and distributed architectures.

title: Topics: Natural Language Processing
description: Statistical and neural approaches to NLP including transformers and large language models.

title: Topics: Machine Learning
description: Supervised and unsupervised learning including deep learning architectures and training methods.

title: Topics: Distributed Systems
description: Consistency consensus replication and the design of large-scale distributed systems.

title: Software Agents
description: Architectures and applications of intelligent software agents including multi-agent coordination.

title: Advanced Topics in Software Engineering
description: Topics vary — recent offerings include cloud-native architectures and observability.

title: Advanced Topics in Computer Communications
description: Network protocols modern transport layers and emerging communication paradigms.

title: Biomedical Signals and Image Processing
description: Signal processing techniques applied to physiological signals and medical imaging.

title: Mobile Computing Systems
description: Architectures and protocols for mobile and wireless computing systems.

title: Computer Communications
description: Network architectures protocols and performance evaluation.

title: Communication Networks
description: Performance analysis of computer and communication networks.

title: Radio Frequency Microelectronics
description: Design of integrated circuits for radio-frequency applications.

title: Topics: Cloud Computing
description: Cloud service models container orchestration and serverless architectures.

title: Topics: DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering
description: CI/CD observability incident response and the operational discipline of running production systems.

title: Topics: Applied Machine Learning
description: Practical ML pipelines feature engineering model deployment and MLOps.

title: Topics: Information Retrieval
description: Search systems ranking embeddings and modern retrieval-augmented generation.

title: Software Engineering Internship
description: Co-op work term in industry — pass/fail credit.
prerequisites: Enrollment in MEng SEP co-op program

title: Software Engineering Internship II
description: Second co-op work term in industry — pass/fail credit.

title: Master's Thesis
description: Independent research thesis — full year.

title: Master's Thesis
description: Independent research thesis — full year.
